title: rondeletia carnea
intro: Rondeletia carnea, also known as the Red Rondeletia, is a perennial plant species native to the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Rondeletia carnea include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Rondeletia carnea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as poultices and salves.
